SELECT item_list FROM list_test WHERE [1, 4] <@ item_list;
SELECT item_list FROM list_test WHERE [2] <@ item_list;
SELECT item_list FROM list_test WHERE [10] <@ item_list;
CREATE TABLE another_list (id INTEGER, values ARRAY<Integer>);
SELECT a.values FROM another_list a JOIN list_test l ON l.item_list <@ a.values;
SELECT l.item_list FROM list_test l WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM another_list a WHERE a.values <@ l.item_list);
SELECT l.item_list FROM list_test l WHERE [1, 2, 3] <@ l.item_list AND [4] <@ l.item_list;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT item_list FROM list_test WHERE item_list <@ [1, 2, 3]) AS subquery WHERE item_list IS NOT NULL;
SELECT l.item_list FROM list_test l WHERE l.item_list <@ (SELECT values FROM another_list WHERE id = 1);
